title: Pull Render
description: shows you a progress bar while you're charging your bow, trident, or crossbow—nothing more, nothing less. It's completely safe for any server and won't give you any gameplay advantage.
body:
# Pull Render - Features:

-  Displays real-time charge progress bars for bows, tridents, and crossbows
Shows charging percentage (0-100%) as you hold the weapon

-  Customizable HUD position via config file
  
-  Zero gameplay modifications - purely visual
  
-  Works on any server (completely safe)
  
-  Minecraft 1.21.5+ compatible
  
-  Lightweight and performant
  
-  Includes custom mod icon
